blockingIssues.description: transition_with_checkpoint claims to validate state transitions but never calls is_valid_transition. Invalid state transitions (e.g., Created -> Accepted) would be silently allowed and checkpointed, corrupting task state.

The 'Agent checkpointing after each tool call' requirement from the feature description is not implemented. CheckpointManager is standalone and not integrated into the orchestrator's agent execution flow.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The skill 'rust-worker' does not exist at .factory/skills/rust-worker/. The actual skill is 'rust' (without '-worker' suffix). Workers should use 'rust' skill, not 'rust-worker'. This caused workers to fall back to base worker procedure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features state-postgres-checkpoint and state-checkpoint-manager both used skillName 'rust-worker' which doesn't exist.

rejectedObservations.observation: Test naming convention deviation in postgres.rs (test_ prefix)
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking style issue, not a functional defect

rejectedObservations.observation: DefaultHasher used instead of cryptographic hash in postgres.rs
rejectedObservations.reason: Acceptable for MVP, noted as non-blocking by reviewer
